examples: The highest price for a Strad at auction was $3.5m, paid in 2006.
To most ears there is little difference between a Strad and a good modern maker, admits Ruggiero Ricci, a master violinist.
Every expert has a story about a "blind" test in which several instruments are played out of sight and the listeners have to guess which is the Strad and which the modern pretender.
Exactly what makes a Strad so magical is contentious.
